calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2514.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public corporation.
No appearance by defendant Matthew C. McCawley, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on August 21, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 21 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Matthew C. McCawley, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $137,192.25.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,520.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $162,712.95.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
